title: Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous

|editor=

"'''Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous'''" is an article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 86|''Star Wars Insider'' 86]]. It details the backstory and life of [[Grievous/Legends|General Grievous]]. [[Abel G. Peña]] wrote the article, while [[Joe Corroney]] provided original illustrations.

The article is accompanied by a [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] supplemental article also written by Peña: ''[[The Story of General Grievous: Lord of War]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
